data.title: Design review reference injection: detailed anti-pattern and compliance entries from reference library
data.description:
Follow-on epic stub — needs /dso:brainstorm before implementation (scrutiny:pending).

## Context
The design-review skill currently consults only the project-level .claude/design-notes.md. It has no access to the structured corpus of anti-patterns, WCAG 2.2 compliance patterns, and design principles established by epic 0b7c-d811. This epic integrates ref-query.sh into design-review using a two-pass pattern: manifest first to identify relevant entry IDs, then full Detail entries loaded for matched IDs. Heaviest injection consumer among the six epics.

## Success Criteria
- design-review queries .claude/scripts/dso ref-query at Detail tier for entries matching components and domains under review
- Two-pass injection: manifest enumeration first, then full Detail for matched IDs only
- Anti-patterns, WCAG 2.2 criteria, and compliance references appear in review findings when applicable
- Review output cites specific corpus entry IDs for traceability

## Dependencies
- Epic 0b7c-d811 (ref-query.sh retrieval contract) must be complete before this epic can be implemented
